summary: Classified the five open pull requests independently as requested by the live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were present, and no close/merge/fix actions are safe or allowed from this plan.

actions.reason: Standalone useful contributor PR; keep for maintainer review rather than closing or inventing a canonical.
Useful standalone feature PR with unresolved CI/review risk; not closable as duplicate, superseded, or low-signal under this shard.
Standalone docs PR with no hydrated duplicate or superseding candidate; keep for normal maintainer review.
Substantial standalone cron bugfix with useful code and passing checks; not a duplicate/superseded/low-signal closeout candidate.
Standalone provider PR with author-waiting/failing-proof state; keep open rather than closing without low-signal close permission.
